title: Software Engineer (Data & AI)
clean_description: objective of jobcontribute to the future of mercedes-benz in china by leading the charge in ai innovation - build innovative solutions, drive rapid prototypes, and scale ai to new heights. as part of the ai&data value team, the position is responsible to deliveresearch and developmentata-driven and ai-powered solutions that help our organization to achieve efficiencies and that excite our customers. responsible foresearch and developmenteveloping and evaluating generative ai, ai and data use case applications through application of llms (and other generative models), statistical machine learning techniques and data analytics to address key business challenges within mercedes-benz china. lead rapid prototyping and poc delivery: lead the rapid development of proof-of-concept (poc) ai applications to demonstrate value and feasibility. develop and deploy ai solutions that are scalable, reliable, and maintainable in a production environment. responsible for contributing to the development and maintenance of foundation infrastructure to enable future data, ai & genai use cases. design and implement robust data pipelines and infrastructure to ensure high-quality data availability for ai model training and deployment. responsible for contributing to and sharing best practice, know-how and participating in relevant technical discussion and governance forums in a subject matter expert capacity. continuously research and evaluate new ai technologies and techniques to ensure mercedes-benz china remains at the forefront of ai innovation.job designation design, develop and deploy, as well as evaluate generative ai, ai and data use case applications through application of llms (and other generative models), statistical machine learning techniques and data analytics. lead the rapid development of proof-of-concept (poc) ai applications to demonstrate value and feasibility:- take full ownership of the poc development lifecycle, from initial concept to demonstration. this includes understanding the business problem, defining the scope of the poc, and identifying key success metrics.- design and implement ai-powered prototypes quickly and efficiently, leveraging existing tools, frameworks, and cloud resources to accelerate development.- evaluate and select the most appropriate ai/ml algorithms, tools, and technologies for each poc, considering factors such as performance, scalability, and cost.- train and evaluate ai/ml models using appropriate techniques, and iterate on model design to achieve desired performance.- work closely with business stakeholders, and other engineers to gather requirements and incorporate feedback into the poc.- identify and mitigate potential risks associated with the poc, such as data availability, model performance, and integration challenges.- work with applications teams to transition successful pocs into production-ready ai applications, ensuring scalability, reliability, and maintainability. identify and acquire relevant data sources foresearch and developmentesigned ai solutions and build and maintain robust data pipelines to ingest, process, and transform large datasets from various sources. contributing to the development and maintenance of foundation infrastructure to enable future data, ai & genai use cases. contributing to and sharing best practice, know-how and participating in relevant technical discussion and governance forums in a subject matter expert capacity. stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in ai and related technologies bachelor or master's in a quantitative degree (computer science, engineering, physics, maths) or equivalent professional experience6+ years experience in related technical field (software engineering, data engineering, data science)strong proficiency in software development principles, data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.strong expertise in programming languages commonly used in ai/ml development (python, java, scala, etc.)familiarity with llm application stack (e.g. langchain, dify, huggingface, pytorch) and techniques (e.g. rag, embeddings, fine-tuning etc..)familiarity with machine learning packages (sklearn, xgboost etc. )solid theoretical fundamentals for statistical methods, machine learning and generative modelsstrong optimization modelling and statistical modelling experience and data aggregation skills, being an expert in analyzing large, complex, multi-dimensional data sets.experience with cloud platforms (azure, aws and/or alicloud) and deploying ai solutions in the cloud.communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.

title: Legal trainee labor and social law (compulsory internship)
clean_description: mercedes-benz group ag is one of the most successful automobile companies in the world. with mercedes-benz ag, the vehicle manufacturer is one of the largest providers of premium and luxury cars and vans. the labor and social law department is part of the human resources department of mercedes-benz group ag. we are responsible for all labor and social law advice for the hr functions in the group, support the executive board in all collective bargaining policy issues and are involved in all personnel policy issues, including negotiations in the responsible employee representatives. these challenges come, among other things, to you:as part of your work, the lawyers in the area will support you by preparing reports on various legal issues or through targeted research on various problems. there is the opportunity to take part in negotiations before the labor courts, in-house lectures, etc. if you would like to take advantage of the opportunity to gain initial insights into the day-to-day business of an international group, then we look forward to receiving your application. the compulsory internship (elective or legal internship) can begin from may 2026 or after arrangement you have successfully completed the first state legal examination. basic knowledge of labor and social law is an advantage. confident german and english skills, both spoken and written. confident use of ms office. commitment online application with cv, cover letter, certificates (especially the first legal exam) and, if necessary, an assignment request. com) will be happy to support you in the application process.

title: Senior Program Manager - Virtual Integration
company: Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited
location: Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited, Bangalore
clean_description: mercedes-benz group ag is one of the world's most successful automotive companies. with mercedes-benz ag, the group is one of the leading global suppliers of high-end passenger cars and premium vans. at mercedes-benz, we are consistently implementing our strategy to transform ourselves towards a fully electric and software-driven future. our efforts are also focused on the intelligent connectivity of our vehicles, autonomous driving and new mobility concepts as we regard this as our aspiration and our obligation to live up to our responsibility to society and the environment. with the transformation to "digital first", we are setting new standards at mercedes-benz and introduced our own data-supported and flexibly updateable operating system in 2025: mb.os - the mercedes-benz operating system. it connects all vehicle domains: infotainment, automated driving, body & comfort and, driving & charging. with the new cla and the new glc, mb.os is available for the first time. our eight people principles of agility, empowerment, co-creation, driven to win, customer orientation, purpose driven, pioneering spirit and learning define how we work, communicate, lead and interact with each other. mercedes-benz research and development india (mbrdi) is the largest research and development center for mercedes-benz group ag outside of germany. through pioneering automotive technologies and world-class engineering excellence, we at mbrdi are actively shaping the future of mobility in india and the globe, remaining steadfast in our commitment to building the world's most desirable cars. it is in the area of in-house embedded sw in body & comfort e/e domain that we are seeking a highly motivated individual for the role of senior program manager - virtual integration. responsibilitieslead a team of ~30 embedded sw engineers into the future to accelerate in-house sw and system maturity through entrepreneurial thinking, e., by envisioning new cutting edge technology, by expanding boundaries of existing technology, etc.lead the team's collective performance by directing mid- and short-term goals, by facilitating individual goal agreements and by driving results throughout the year.enable individual team member learning and development.foster a positive, open and forward-thinking working environment for the team that promotes accountability, learning, innovation, motivation and excellence.lead the team's operations.lead strategic and/or transformational initiatives within the department and within organization to drive change and to improve continuously.collaborate across departments, centers and borders to improve organizational effectiveness and to drive results for the company necessary qualificationbachelor of engineering in electrical, electronics, computer science or similar field. demonstrated history of successful results in embedded system and/or sw development and/or testing. preferred qualificationproficiency in embedded sw virtualization tools such as vector vvirtualtarget, synopsys silver, etc.proficiency in embedded sw development and testing tools such as matlab/simulink, synopsys tpt, etc.proficiency in agile way of working. familiarity in aspice process assessment framework. istqb certification. why join us? be part of a purpose-driven organization that is shaping the future of mobility work on cutting-edge technologies and global projects thrive in a collaborative, diverse, and inclusive environment access world-class infrastructure and continuous learning opportunitiesequal opportunity statementat mbrdi, we are committed to diversity and inclusion.

title: Student for master's thesis in the area of ​​Advanced Analytics & AI in Purchasing
clean_description: the way buyers prepare and conduct negotiations is facing a fundamental change. negotiations in purchasing are complex, context-dependent and crucial to the success of the company - and yet they have hardly been supported digitally to date. new technologies open up the possibility of providing buyers with targeted support in the preparation and implementation of negotiations: from situation analysis to situational strategy recommendations. your thesis is created in this area of ​​tension between strategic negotiation and digital innovation. at mercedes-benz, we are working to bring together a previously fragmented digital working environment in purchasing into a seamless, intelligent platform. in this innovation project, we are rethinking the entire user journey of buyers - and an ai-supported system for negotiation support is one of the central innovations that we want to establish. you work directly in a team, embedded in a modern, cloud-based technology stack. you do not just want to study theory, but develop real solutions? become part of our team of purchasing digitizers, data enthusiasts and ai pioneers who are shaping the procurement of the future together. as a graduate candidate, the following exciting tasks await you: you will analyze the state of the art on ai agent networks, large language models in the enterprise context and ai-supported negotiation support in procurement - and thereby create the scientific foundation of your work. you will collect and structure requirements in close coordination with the team and translate the real needs of buyers into a clear technical and professional target image. you will design a digital system for negotiation support purchasing - you work out which technologies and use cases make sense based on your analysis - the focus is on a concept that evaluates the initial situation and the competitive environment of a negotiation and supports buyers in using the right strategy at the right time. you embed your concept in the existing cloud-based infrastructure and define data flows and interfaces to existing systems. you optionally implement a proof-of-concept of individual agent components and thus make the concept tangible and evaluable. you define suitable metrics and evaluation criteria for the performance of the system and apply them systematically. you document your results and derive concrete recommendations for action for productive use. the final topic is determined in consultation with the university, you and us. the activity can start from july 2026 ideally, you have the following: advanced master's degree in business informatics or industrial engineering - alternatively business administration with a focus on digitalization, supply chain or purchasinginitial knowledge of negotiation, negotiation strategies or game theory - whether from your studies, a seminar paper or practicebasic knowledge of purchasing processes or supply chain managementbasic knowledge of programming, ideally in pythoninterest in digital solutions and willingness to independently evaluate suitable technologiesvery good german and good written and spoken english sets you apart: programming knowledge, preferably in pythonexperience with data-driven systems or cloud architecturesknowledge of prompt engineering, large language models or multi-agent frameworksinterest in ux/ui conception or human-computer interactionpersonal skills:you take on personal responsibility - this also includes independently acquiring a supervising chair at a university or technical collegeyou think in a structured and conceptual way, even with complex and open ones questionsyou communicate clearly and confidently - even to non-technical stakeholdersyou have genuine curiosity for new technologies and are interested in the interface between ai and human decision-makingyou work scientifically precisely and do not lose sight of the practical benefitswhat we offerreal impact: your work flows directly into an ongoing innovation project and can permanently change the everyday work of buyers at mercedes-benzembedded team: you are part of a committed team fixed contact persons and will be closely supported in terms of content. market-standard remuneration for the duration of the thesisnetwork: insights into the purchasing organization of one of the world's leading automobile manufacturers and direct contact with experts in digitalization, data engineering and ai. additional information: we look forward to receiving your online application with your cv, cover letter, certificates, current certificate of enrollment with details of the semester, if applicable, proof of compulsory internship and proof of the standard period of study. com) will be happy to support you in the application process.

clean_description: we are seeking an outstanding and highly innovative expert research scientist on polyfunctional robot control to join our core research team. in this pivotal role you will be instrumental in the research design development and deployment of cutting edge control algorithms and architectures for our next generation polyfunctional robots. this is about ensuring that our robots can execute complex maneuvers interact safely with their surroundings and adapt to unforeseen challenges bringing theoretical control concepts into real world high performance robotic applications. what you will do lead advanced control r d drive cutting edge research in robust and adaptive control algorithms and architectures for polyfunctional robots in industrial environments. design implement core control strategies develop and implement advanced algorithmic motion force impedance and robust optimal control techniques e.g. task space joint space wbc . integrate learning adaptability research and apply adaptive control reinforcement learning and other learning methods for skill acquisition and autonomous improvement. real time control system design architect real time control systems considering computational constraints communication latencies and sensor feedback for high performance and stable robot operation. model based control develop and utilize accurate dynamic robot models for simulation control design and state estimation. safety critical control design and implement control strategies for safe human robot interaction collision avoidance and anomaly detection including human robot collaboration e.g. shared autonomy compliant interaction . performance evaluation validation rigorously evaluate control algorithms through simulation hil testing and experiments on physical robots analyzing stability robustness and performance. utilize advanced simulation and digital twin technologies for rapid prototyping testing and validation. collaboration documentation integrate control solutions with mechatronics embedded systems and ai perception teams. document research algorithms code and results. this includes o collaborating with embedded systems engineers for efficient real time algorithm execution and providing clear computational real time and communication interface requirements. o working with mechatronics system engineers to understand robot kinematics dynamics and actuator capabilities for optimal control design. o collaborating with perception ai researchers to leverage advanced perception data for intelligent control and learning and to effectively utilize perception outputs for advanced control tasks and intelligent behaviors. o interfacing with system integration engineers for seamless control module integration system level testing performance tuning and validation certification of overall system safety. what we are looking for education master or ph.d. in robotics electrical engineering mechanical engineering automation engineering computer science or a related field with a specialization in robot control. experience proven track record in developing and implementing advanced control algorithms for complex robotic systems with a strong preference for experience with legged robots or high dof manipulators. technical expertise o robot kinematics dynamics deep theoretical and practical understanding of robot kinematics forward inverse kinematics and dynamics forward inverse dynamics . o advanced control techniques expertise in advanced control techniques such as whole body control wbc model predictive control mpc impedance control force control and optimal control. o numerical optimization proficiency in numerical optimization methods particularly quadratic programming qp solvers. o programming real time systems strong programming skills in c essential and python with experience in real time operating systems rtos and linux environments. o robotics middleware experience with robotics middleware e.g. ros ros 2 . problem solving exceptional analytical and problem solving skills with the ability to tackle complex open ended research challenges. communication excellent written and verbal communication skills capable of presenting complex technical concepts clearly and collaborating effectively in a team environment. passion a deep passion for polyfunctional robotics motor control and the fascinating mechanisms of biological movement. bonus points if you have experience with specific polyfunctional robot platforms e.g. digit atlas valkyrie unitree h1 etc. . familiarity with simulation tools like mujoco gazebo or isaac sim. experience with sensor fusion techniques e.g. kalman filters extended kalman filters . knowledge of machine learning especially reinforcement learning for control is a plus. experience with safety critical control systems. why join us impact be a foundational contributor to a project that will enable polyfunctional robots to perform complex physical tasks with unprecedented skill and agility. innovation work on truly novel problems at the intersection of neuroscience control theory and advanced robotics. resources access to state of the art computing infrastructure advanced polyfunctional robot platforms and a dedicated team of experts. a collaborative intellectually stimulating and supportive environment where your ideas are valued and encouraged. growth opportunities for professional development continuous learning and career advancement in a rapidly evolving and high impact field. ready to give our polyfunctional robots the gift of exquisite movement and adaptation if you are a pioneering researcher eager to make a profound impact on the future of embodied ai and robotics we encourage you to apply please submit your cv a cover letter outlining your research interests and relevant experience and links to your publications or research portfolio.

title: Expert Research Scientist on Polyfunctional Robot Perception & AI
location: Beijing - Beijing Shi - ChinaShanghai - Shanghai Shi - ChinaSuzhou - Jiangsu Sheng - China
clean_description: the opportunity expert research scientist on polyfunctional robot perception ai are you a trailblazing researcher with a deep passion for enabling robots to truly see understand and reason about the world around them we are seeking an outstanding and highly innovative expert research scientist on polyfunctional robot perception ai to join our core research team. in this pivotal role you will be instrumental in the research design development and deployment of advanced perception and ai algorithms that allow our next generation polyfunctional robots to perceive their surroundings interpret complex scenes make intelligent decisions and learn from experience. this is about giving our robots the cognitive capabilities to excel in challenging unstructured industrial settings. what you will do lead perception ai research drive cutting edge research in robot perception and ai focusing on developing novel algorithms and methodologies for polyfunctional robots operating in industrial environments. sensor data fusion design and implement advanced sensor fusion techniques e.g. kalman filters particle filters deep learning based fusion to combine data from various modalities e.g. lidar cameras depth sensors force torque sensors for robust state estimation and environmental understanding. object detection recognition tracking develop and optimize algorithms for real time object detection recognition pose estimation and tracking of known and unknown objects including deformable objects and those in cluttered scenes. scene understanding semantic mapping research and develop methods for semantic scene understanding 3d reconstruction dynamic environment mapping enabling robots to build rich actionable representations of their surroundings. ai driven task planning decision making develop ai algorithms for high level task planning decision making under uncertainty and intelligent behavior generation leveraging perception outputs for adaptive robot autonomy. machine learning for robotics apply and advance machine learning techniques e.g. deep learning reinforcement learning imitation learning for various perception and ai challenges including learning from demonstration and continuous self improvement. performance evaluation benchmarking rigorously evaluate perception and ai algorithms through simulation and real world experiments analyzing accuracy robustness and computational efficiency. collaboration documentation o work closely with control engineers to provide perception data for intelligent control strategies. o collaborate with embedded systems engineers to ensure efficient real time execution of perception and ai algorithms. o partner with mechatronics system engineers to understand sensor capabilities and physical constraints. o interface with system integration engineers for seamless integration testing and validation of perception and ai modules. document research algorithms code and results. what you bring education master or ph.d. in robotics computer science artificial intelligence electrical engineering or a closely related field with a strong focus on robot perception computer vision or machine learning. research development experience proven track record of significant research design and development contributions in robot perception large language models llms or large multimodal models lmms reinforcement learning rl embodied ai embodied agents or generative ai for complex behaviors or world models. core technical expertise o computer vision expert level proficiency in computer vision algorithms including pose estimation object detection 3d perception point cloud processing and multi view geometry. o sensor fusion deep experience with advanced sensor fusion techniques particularly combining data from disparate sources like imu vision and joint states for robust state estimation and environmental modeling. o machine learning deep learning deep theoretical and practical experience with various ml dl architectures e.g. cnns rnns transformers and frameworks e.g. tensorflow pytorch applied to robotic tasks. o task planning solid understanding and experience with basic task planning methodologies including classical ai planning state space search or other decision making frameworks for robotics. o robotics software expert level proficiency in c and python with extensive experience in robotics middleware e.g. ros ros 2 . o simulation based learning testing experience leveraging simulation environments e.g. gazebo isaac sim for data generation training and testing of perception and ai algorithms including techniques like simulation to real sim2real transfer. o algorithm optimization ability to optimize perception and ai algorithms for real time performance on constrained hardware e.g. gpus fpgas embedded processors . solid understanding of linear algebra probability theory statistics and optimization techniques relevant to perception and ai. problem solving exceptional analytical experimental and problem solving skills with the ability to tackle complex unstructured perception and ai challenges in real world scenarios. hands on skills demonstrated ability to implement test and deploy perception and ai algorithms on physical robotic platforms including data collection annotation model training and validation. communication excellent written and verbal communication skills capable of presenting complex technical concepts clearly publishing research findings and collaborating effectively in a multidisciplinary team environment. passion a deep passion for advancing the intelligence and perceptual capabilities of polyfunctional robots and a desire to see your research make a tangible impact. bonus points if you have familiarity with functional safety considerations for ai driven systems in industrial applications. knowledge of explainable ai xai or robust ai techniques for safety critical applications. experience with semantic slam or dynamic environment mapping. innovation work on truly novel research problems at the intersection of perception ai and advanced robotics pushing the boundaries of what intelligent machines can achieve. resources access to state of the art computing infrastructure advanced robotic platforms extensive sensor suites and a dedicated team of experts. a collaborative intellectually stimulating and supportive environment where your groundbreaking ideas are valued and encouraged. growth opportunities for professional development continuous learning and career advancement in a rapidly evolving and high impact field. ready to empower polyfunctional robots with intelligence and perception if you are a pioneering research scientist eager to make a profound impact on the cognitive capabilities of advanced robotic systems we encourage you to apply please submit your cv a cover letter outlining your research interests and relevant experience and links to your portfolio publications or github profile.

title: Student for thesis: Multimodal inference of user satisfaction in dialogue systems
clean_description: mercedes-benz group ag is one of the most successful automobile companies in the world. with mercedes-benz ag and the business areas mercedes-benz cars, mercedes-benz vans and mercedes-benz mobility ag, the vehicle manufacturer is one of the largest and most successful providers of premium passenger cars. becoming part of mercedes-benz means finding the area of ​​responsibility in which you can individually develop your talents. it means doing your best in a global automotive company that aims to build the most desirable cars in the world. you will be supported by visionary colleagues who share your pioneering spirit. together for excellence.we are innovative experiencein our cross-functional "holistic customer centered experiences" team, we are designing the guiding principle of our ux vision for the mercedes-benz user experience of the future. with this vision, we are developing a new, holistic customer experience in our vehicles and beyond. our customers are the focus around which we design the mercedes-benz experience. these challenges come to you: modern task-oriented dialog agents rely heavily on explicit user feedback or task completion metrics to evaluate the success of an interaction. however, in real-world environments, such as automotive in-vehicle assistants, explicit feedback is extremely rare. this work addresses the inference of implicit, multimodal feedback as a central problem in machine learning. the focus is on the algorithmic tracking of the latent user state (belief state) under partial observability. by predicting dissatisfaction early in the course of an interaction, the model enables a closed ai system to proactively adjust its dialogue policy before the interaction fails. the primary scientific contribution will be the training of the model and the development of a pipeline for its evaluation from a machine learning perspective. your tasks development of latent models: construction and training of recurrent belief state models over the course of the interaction over time as well as their benchmarking against purely text-based llms and multimodal late fusion classifiers design of rigorous ml evaluations: implementation of evaluation pipelines with a strong focus on early ones inferenceisolation of causal signals: training of negative control variables (e. current street context or general mood) in order to mathematically prove that the model actually isolates the causal influence of the assistant on user satisfaction and does not just represent ambient noise. the final topic is determined in consultation with the university, you and us. the activity can begin from august 2026 enrolled in the degree program: (media) computer science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, data science, engineering psychology or a comparable course of study with a corresponding focus. in-depth knowledge of artificial intelligence and machine learning. first experiences in the analysis of multimodal data sets. great interest in technological trends and their potential. enjoyment of independent work and challenges, recognizable by high motivation, willingness to implement, commitment, ability to work in a team and active communication and analytical thinking and strategic working methods. confident written and spoken german and english skills. confident use of ms office and sw development tools such as atlassian confluence, jira, etc.ideally a class b driving licenseadditional information:we look forward to receiving your online application with a cv, cover letter, certificates, current certificate of enrollment with details of the subject semester and proof of the standard period of study. com) will be happy to support you in the application process.

title: Car Line Management
clean_description: objective:in terms of carline management for china lead vehicle project, you will be the key interface between procurement function of mb hq, dgrc and bbac for all procurement related topics and the representative of mb procurement team with all relevant internal and external stakeholders. from project strategy phase to the end of supplieresearch and developmentetermination, your responsibility is to make the procurement status transparent in cross functional departments from both timing and cost perspective to facilitate smooth procurement process in framework of china lead vehicle project. you will actively communicate with colleagues procurement, program management, controlling, rd, supplier quality and bbac as jv partner etc. carline management in germany will frequently exchange knowledge and experience with you about the global project information, the major tasks for you are 1) to align the localization target and strategy for china lead vehicle project; 2) to create the sourcing roadmap and steering the sourcing to achieved defined project me; 3) to shape the transparency about sourcing and cost status to relevant project stakeholders and mb management task description:1. be the interface between procurement function of mercedes-benz group china, mb hq, and bbac for all procurement topics. representation of mercedes-benz procurement (china & germany) in relevant project meetings, workshops, correlation and collaboration with all relevant internal and external partners to provide relevant data for the project in time3. drive and steer purchased parts related topics among rd, cost planning, production plant and the project managers in a cross functional and international environment4. lead alignment of localization strategy; meanwhile work as a bridging between mb hq/china, and bbac. creating sourcing roadmap for localization project; tracking the maturity of sourcing activities from both timing and cost perspective; accordingly, reporting cost target achievement to project head and mb management6. organizing internal meetings regularly with involvement of high management level of procurement china for procurement activity optimization and internal decision - university degree in business, economics, engineering, or similar education- several years' work experiences in automotive industry (or comparable)- knowledge in automotive production processes, knowledge about procurement and cost management- experience in comparative cost systems, calculation & planning, project cooperation with multi-stakeholders- multicultural environmental experiences- high motivation and flexibility combined with a high ability to work independently- fluent in written and spoken english, german language skills are appreciated as a plus- problem solving skills and team orientation- profound computer competencies in ms office applications (excel, powerpoint, outlook).

title: Intern measurement technology development MB.OS
clean_description: in group research & mercedes-benz cars development (rd), we shape the automobile generations of the future. we develop innovative products of the highest quality and rely on efficient development processes. we are already working on vehicles that will ensure mercedes-benz ag's technological leadership in the future. in cross-departmental networked teams, all software and e/e systems (electrics/electronics) of the mb.os platform and their functions of the entire vehicle are secured and brought into series production. within the e/e whole vehicle integration department, we bring together all systems of the mb.os platform and integrate them into the entire vehicle. in order to secure this platform, our team develops complex measurement technology systems. if you want to know how software in cars really works, and not just theoretically, then you have come to the right place! at mercedes-benz you will work on the next generation of our mb.os operating system - directly on the entire vehicle. together as a team, you develop and test measurement technology systems that ensure that everything runs reliably. you analyze requirements and understand what our systems have to be able to do. you derive your own test cases from them and furtheresearch and developmentevelop them. you actively work on the measurement technology in the vehicle (including setting up measurement racks). you search for errors - e. with cabling or system behavioryou support the preparation and commissioning of measuring systemsyou are part of current projects related to mb.osthe activity can begin from august 2026 what you bring with you: studies e.g. b. in mechatronics, vehicle technology, computer science or a comparable field interested in how the e/e system works in the entire vehicle initial programming knowledge (e.g. python, c#) is a plus you also like to get hands-on (mechanical and electrical) you like working in a team and think analytically fluent in german and english additional information: we look forward to receiving your online application with cv, cover letter, certificates, current ones certificate of enrollment stating the semester, if applicable, proof of compulsory internship and proof of the standard period of study. com) will be happy to support you in the application process.

title: Group Leader Maintenance
clean_description: shape the future today. the world is changing. the question is, what will be our contribution to the outcome? we have set the pace in the field of mobility from the very beginning, and we will continue to do so. at mercedes-benz vans, interdisciplinary teams are developing the mobility of tomorrow. our goal is to make mobility safer, simpler, and more sustainable for people across the globe. put your pioneering spirit to good use: this is your opportunity to make a contribution that extends far beyond your job title. at mercedes-benz vans, we offer you the perfect environment for your professional and personal growth. cutting-edge training and promising career opportunities will help you to foster and expand your professional skill set as well as your individual strengths. think, try, and thrive with us in collaborative work environments that spark game-changing concepts. job overview:use knowledge of, and experience with, automotive manufacturing industry repair work including necessary disassembly and re-assembly of production equipment as well as application of root because analysis in multiple technical work areas to: manage the safety, productivity, training, morale, and security of a team of ten (10) to fifteen (15) maintenance technicians for project management and workshop involvement; monitor production equipment and meet established equipment availability targets; act as the technical and disciplinary lead of the group; administer company policies and procedures; assume ownership and accountability for personnel management including evaluations/reviews, coaching, counseling, resource planning and team building; coordinate schedules and workflow for the team; plan, control, and approve vacation, employee shifts, and schedules; drive continuous improvement for production processes, efficiency, product quality, environment, and ergonomics; identify trouble areas and resolve issues; facilitate and participate in regularly scheduled meetings; introduce measures for positive development of employees; resolve complex employee issues; manage flow of communication to the team and to management; oversee, organize, and coordinate all work content of the group; motivate, support, develop, and challenge team members to their optimal potential; perform otheresearch and developmentuties as assigned; prepare reports based on data; present findings to management and others; provide feedback to all involved departments to improve overall performance of the plant; resolve issues that are varied and non-routine; and may order materials and/or spare parts. qualificationsqualifications: high school diploma (or foreign equivalent) plus three (3) years of supervisory experience in a manufacturing environment evidencing demonstrable ability to perform stated job duties. new hires subject to drug test/background check. 40 hours per week 7 am to 7:30 pm. we are all in for change. are you too? apply now. if you have experience in the above and are interested in joining an outstanding company we welcome you to apply. the division mercedes-benz vans is world renown for quality and innovative products. excellent compensation & benefits plan with 401k matching mercedes-benz vans, llc is committed to fostering an inclusive environment that appreciates and leverages the diversity of our team. we provide equal employment opportunity (eeo) to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, ethnicity, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), age, national origin, religion, marital status, veteran status, physical or otheresearch and developmentisability, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law.

title: Commissioning engineer (m/f/d) for mobility projects
clean_description: together we make the difference siemens mobility is an independently managed siemens ag company and has been a leading provider in the field of mobility for over 160 years. we have always been very innovative to make travel faster safer and more comfortable. that is why we shape mobility with passion and are always one step ahead. our 40 000 employees are mobility pioneers who help keep the world moving. your path leads you into the expert house from siemens mobility which carries out national and international projects in the field of railway technology e.g. in the new generations of battery or hydrogen powered trains. you independently carry out commissioning work as well as preventive and corrective maintenance measures on rail vehicle components and systems. you are responsible for electrical and mechanical conversion and adaptation work on the train and will then put it back into operation. you support with fault analysis and troubleshooting on the rail vehicles. you will be supported by innovative it systems. you will receive comprehensive training and will be specifically supported through training and further education. we will make you an expert in the future rail industry. through your work at the expert house you will get to know a wide variety of areas in our company. this opens up a variety of opportunities for your development both personally and with regard to your career at siemens mobility. you are exactly the right person for us if you have completed vocational training in the electrical engineering field with many years of relevant experience or have completed further training to become a state certified technician bachelor of professional specializing in electrical engineering mechatronics. you have good knowledge of german and english for your new role on the international stage. you have strong abilities to work independently and responsibly as well as team spirit to work in international teams. you are mobile and have a class b driving license. attractive conditions you will receive an attractive compensation package including the benefits of the collective agreement e.g. additional pay and holiday pay and other extras e.g. company pension scheme and share program . employee benefits and extras with us you will be well looked after you have access to a company restaurant a company medical service a comprehensive range of sports and leisure activities as well as shopping advantages through employee offers. we offer you comprehensive training opportunities for your professional and personal development. you can find an overview of our benefits here . if you would like to find out more about siemens mobility expert house before applying. the contact person for this job advertisement is ms. veronika windmaier.

sacramento california facility. in this role as a member of the electrical engineering department the candidate will initially lead the transfer of existing and build up of new hardware in the loop hil test benches for all product lines developed in sacramento locomotives passenger coaches light rail vehicles as well as the maintenance and modification of their simulation software. later the candidate will transition into a software validation role responsible for creating and performing software tests to confirm the functionality of various train control and monitoring software packages created by the development group to ensure compliance with industry standards and customer specifications. to support the growing need for automation and increased efficiency this role shall also implement means of automated testing and ai assisted procedure generation in collaboration with the ai architect and other stakeholders. initial responsibilities in lab admin role modifying or building test setups from wiring and parts information under observation of relevant rules for electrical safety and workmanship configuration loading and execution of both embedded code for control system components and simulation software for test execution configuration of network equipment such as managed ethernet switches with necessary rulesets and other settings reflecting the desired vehicle control architecture adjustment of simulation environment to new project needs and changes in hardware configuration additional responsibilities to be added in software validation role interprets all relevant customer and internal functional requirements and translates them into software test specifications and performs testing on various hil test benches interfaces with system engineers other validation engineers and software developers clarifying desired functionality and reviewing code understands logic diagrams software logic functions understands requirements of relevant standards like en 50657 and safety related topics like sil levels and associated architectures supports testers and commissioning technicians on site to troubleshoot and to resolve software related engineering issues on the vehicles write software test documentation according to ieee 1558 to thrive in this role you have bachelor s degree in computer science it or electrical engineering with 2 or more years of relevant work experience preferred . associate degree in engineering with 5 or more years of relevant work experience. knowledge in software development for embedded systems preferably on moving vehicles incl. object oriented design understanding of logic flow diagrams electrical diagrams and similar understanding of ethernet based networks and involved hardware what will make you stand out rail experience in train control and monitoring systems understanding of graphical programming languages used for plcs i.e. per iec 61131 familiar with the application of bus tuition reimbursement program mentor programs and your development through online learning. we operate daily with a growth mindset that is why siemens consistently ranks on the fortune world s most admired companies list the salary may be higher or lower depending on the budget and the candidate s experience knowledge skills and qualifications. join the growing team at our world class train manufacturing facility in sacramento ca.

title: Rail Technician West Palm Beach FL Mobility Customer Service
location: West Palm Beach - Florida - United States of America
clean_description: pioneering in america from the first mile to the last. this is what drives us. for more than 160 years siemens has been an integral provider of infrastructure electrification and transportation solutions in the united states. rail systems must do one thing above all run. with modern maintenance solutions from diagnostics to data based action recommendations from quick delivery of replacement parts to strategically planned modernization we ensure your systems highest reliability and availability 100 railability . we are constantly developing new intelligent mobility solutions that increase the availability of infrastructure for the society optimize route usage and create a new quality of travel. good service means we are there for our partners and customers when they need us and beyond. that is because we define ourselves by what we do. every day every hour every minute. we help our customers move the world. we are proud to be great place to work certified a reflection of our commitment to creating an environment where innovation thrives and every voice matters. apply today and be part of shaping the future with us position overview siemens mobility is seeking to hire rail technicians to inspect maintain and repair trains at our west palm beach fl facility. in this role you will perform day to day running maintenance and unscheduled repair to a fleet of locomotives coaches and train sets via maintenance instructions from computer maintenance management system cmms . what your day to day will look like follow all maintenance instructions wherever available to enforce to and maintain compliance and high quality standards. verify that all defects tasks and incidents have been reported and detailed in cmms for compliance issue tracking and closure. provide body welding paint repair to locomotives coaches and train sets. keep workstation and work areas clean and free of debris at all times. develop a working relationship with the customer as an employee and representative of siemens mobility. maintain compliance to all federal railroad administration fra related safety rules laws and regulations. collaborate with the leadership as needed on all site issues systems and related facility operations. willing to perform all other functions as needed including forklift operation daily cleaning operations. to thrive in this role you have high school diploma ged minimum 3 years of working experience with a railroad or other technical field s . technical training will also be considered with lesser work experience setting you apart would be detailed knowledge of technical aspects of the rolling stock depot. physical demands the physical demands described here are representative of those necessary to successfully perform the essential job duties frequently walk reach with hands and arms stoop kneel crouch or crawl. frequently required to climb stairs steps and ladders frequently required to work on elevated platforms. occasionally lift and move at most 40 pounds. specific vision abilities include close vision distance vision color vision peripheral vision depth perception and the ability to focus. pushing and pulling objects towards and away from origin of force. keyboarding on a computer or other machine by means of a traditional keyboard. gross and fine manipulation to include holding grasping and pinching using hands and fingers. driving forklifts golf carts yard buggies etc. the ability to hear understand and distinguish speech and or other sounds in person or via communication radio. reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform essential job functions. we believe that each member of our team is accountable for making decisions solving problems and taking actions that contribute to long term impact and financial success. we do the right thing. we stand for green innovations and meaningful solutions with impact on customers ecosystem partners society and environment. therefore we are hiring ambitious forward thinkers who want to have a real impact. solve the world s most significant problems be part of exciting and innovative projects. opportunities to contribute your innovative ideas and get paid for them take advantage of our tuition reimbursement program mentor programs and your development through online learning. we operate daily with a growth mindset that is why siemens consistently ranks on the fortune world s most admired companies list employee perks and discounts in addition to our 401k match and generous paid time off applicants must be legally authorized for employment in the united states without needing current or future employer sponsored work authorization.

title: Platform & Vehicle Architecture Design Expert
clean_description: the platform & vehicle architecture design expert defines the overall vehicle and platform architecture, ensuring the optimal geometric integration of all systems, modules, and components into a consistent, scalable vehicle concept. the objective is to achieve the best overall balance of function, design, ergonomics, weight, cost, and brand differentiation, while fully meeting requirements for manufacturing, assembly, crash safety, homologation, and service.acting as the central architectural authority and moderation hub in the development process, the role sets the foundation for a continuously updated digital mock-up (dmu). from strategy through series development, the expert translates market and business requirements-particularly for the chinese market-into competitive dimensional and architectural concepts, validates them through digital and physical mock-ups, and ensures robust, milestone-compliant implementation according to mercedes-benz development system (mds) across all development phases master's degree or phd in automotive engineering, mechanical engineering, systems engineering, or a closely related technical field. more than 10 years of experience in overall vehicle design, vehicle packaging, or vehicle/platform architecture, with demonstrated responsibility beyond a single vehicle project. proven experience in platform and multi-derivative architectures, including definition of dimensional concepts, hardpoints, interfaces, and modular strategies. demonstrated track record as a technical authority in complex, cross-functional decision-making, balancing performance, cost, weight, quality, timing, and industrial feasibility. deep, system-level understanding of vehicle domains (body, chassis, powertrain, e/e, interior, exterior, safety) and their architectural interactions. strong experience with digital mock-up (dmu) driven development, virtual validation, and concept feasibility assessment from early strategy to series release. solid knowledge of automotive development processes, milestones (e.g. mds), and requirements related to crash, homologation, manufacturing, assembly, and service. ability to translate market, customer, and regional (china) requirements into competitive vehicle and platform architectures. excellent moderation, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align global counterparts and influence management-level decisions.

title: Dual study course Embedded Systems/Automotive Engineering (B.Eng.) Campus model Sindelfingen/Stuttgart, October 1st, 2027 (f/m/d)
clean_description: the dual study program at mercedes-benz not only provides you with sound academic training and practical experience, but also essential corporate experience. the campus model allows you to experience the company up close! in joint training courses and seminars, which mainly take place in stuttgart, you will meet students from all plants. during your practical placements in the second and third year of your studies, you will start at your main plant in sindelfingen. you will spend the theoretical phases at the baden-württemberg cooperative state university on the friedrichshafen campus. the embedded systems course combines engineering with computer science. it combines content from electrical engineering, electronics, information technology and systems engineering. whenever a computer system consisting of hardware and software components is "embedded" in a comprehensive technical product, we are dealing with this cross-sectional technology. in everyday life, we encounter embedded systems, for example in smartphones, smart tvs and also in our vehicles: in infotainment, assistance and security systems or in autonomous driving. in the automotive engineering course, in addition to the technical basics of electrical engineering, electronics and computer science, extensive teaching content on system and software development, approval requirements, norms and industry standards in the automotive industry is taught. during the practical phases, you will gain experience, for example, in vehicle development, in software and control device development, in measurement and testing technology or in production. we offer you an attractive salary during youresearch and developmentual study program. after successful completion, you will have optimal entry and career opportunities in the company due to your practical experience attachments for the online application: your last two certificates and your cv you can find our minimum academic requirements for your application on our homepage what you should also bring with you: initiative, commitment and flexibility good communication and team skills great interest in technical and information technology topics strong logical-analytical thinking enthusiasm for our products willingness to be mobile we are particularly pleased about applications from further informationduration of study: october 1st, 2027 - september 30th, 2030the theory phases take place at the dhbw ravensburg, friedrichshafen campus. the practical assignments take place in stuttgart in the first year of study and predominantly at the sindelfingen location from the second year onwards. an assignment can take place worldwide. we promote your mobility through the germany ticket jugendbw. if you change location, you will receive additional financial support. when staying in the greater stuttgart area, accommodation in a dormitory is usually possible.

company: Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited
location: Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited, Bangalore
clean_description: about mbrdimercedes-benz research and development india (mbrdi), headquartered in bengaluru with a satellite office in pune, is the largest r&d center for mercedes-benz group ag outside of germany. our mission is to drive innovation and excellence in automotive engineering, digitalization, and sustainable mobility solutions, shaping the future of mobility.job title: entra id engineerjob overview 6+ years of hands-on technical experience in enterprise environments with azure ad, microsoft identity and access management services (entra id, entra id premium solutions, conditional access, sso, mfa, pam/pim, and third-party iam solution integration with entra id) in implementation and operations. this includes designing and implementing entra id for organizations, including integrations with applications.key responsibilities deep understanding of microsoft entra id tenant architecture (single vs multi-tenant, prod vs non-prod separation). tenant hardening & security baseline implementation aligned with microsoft / cis benchmarks. experience securing global admin, security admin, intune admin, and other privileged roles. experience with continuous access evaluation (cae) and session controls. troubleshooting conditional access evaluation behavior (token audience, scopes, client type, spa vs confidential apps). understanding microsoft-managed conditional access policies (e., risky sign-ins). experience implementing phishing-resistant authentication (fido2 / passwordless). understanding of federated vs cloud-only authentication flows. knowledge of privileged access concepts and admin separation models. develop and maintain identity and access management policies and procedures. support in registering all types of applications and their configuration in entra id (saml, app proxy, api management, manifest changes, rbac, ca, etc. review application configuration, permissions, access control, and usage to keep the environment secure and risk-free. monitor and handle tickets (incident/request/changes) effectively. provide effective coordination and end-to-end support to clients in integration of their applications. assist clients with migrating applications (legacy platforms or other) to entra id as the identity provider qualifications 6+ years of experience in identity and access management with azure ad. 4+ years of experience in entra id and entra connect. strong understanding of identity federation, single sign-on (sso), and multi-factor authentication (mfa). experience with directory services, such as active directory and azure ad. proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., powershell) for automation tasks. excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. ability to work independently and as part of a team. must have very good interpersonal skills, such as being a team player, clear and transparent communication skills, constructive feedback, decision-making, and responsibility. preferred qualifications relevant certifications in identity and access management (e.g., microsoft certified: identity and access administrator associate). experience with cloud platforms such as azure or google cloud. knowledge of security frameworks and compliance standards (e.g., iso 27001, gdpr).why join us? be part of a purpose-driven organization that is shaping the future of mobility. work on cutting-edge technologies and global projects. thrive in a collaborative, diverse, and inclusive environment. access world-class infrastructure and continuous learning opportunities. equal opportunity statementat mbrdi, we are committed to diversity and inclusion.

title: Gas Turbine - Turbine Heat Transfer Engineer
clean_description: if you really want to make a difference make it with us at siemens energy we can. our technology is key but our people make the difference. they connect create and keep us on track towards changing the world s energy systems. their spirit fuels our mission. our culture is defined by caring agile respectful and accountable individuals. we value excellence of any kind. heat transfer engineer design analyzes and implements the thermal design of turbine components such as blades vanes nozzle casing rotor discs. a given day could involve engagement in concept generation heat transfer fluid dynamics calculations using 1d 2d in house tools and hand calculations. other days could see collaboration with interface discipline like cad modelers to define 3d cfd cht model prepare boundary conditions solving cfd cht calculations debugging and reviewing the results. the tasks range from design analysis of new components upgrade of existing components prediction of component performance under new boundary conditions towards customer support and resolving non conformance reports from manufacturing. in addition to this engineer needs to support developmental and testing aspects post final design review for validation of the product. job requires regular interaction with global teams hence engineer should have persuasive communication skills and cross cultural knowledge. your new role challenging and future oriented heat transfer and cooling design and analysis of gas turbine parts rotating or stationary or system . heat transfer and flow analysis using inhouse commercial 1d 2d 3d cfd codes e.g. cfx star ccm . able to understand physics apply relevant assumptions interpret results perform basic hand calculations in fluid mechanics heat transfer discipline. thermal flow modelling using flow network approach with pressure loss and heat transfer correlations. able to apply boundary conditions to a fe solver ansys abaqus nx sim center for the calculations of material temperature. able to understand the product function design requirements and design guidelines. be a point of contact speaking partner and provide expertise regarding hot gas path heat transfer related topics in a project. collaborate with project lead in understanding the project requirements find solutions to design challenges and deliver results within agreed timeline quality. a fraction of time will be dedicated to advancing the technical expertise of other team members and mentoring. opportunities exist for travel and publishing technical reports in journals and conferences. a balance between scientific rigor and engineering compromise. minimum 2 3 years of relevant experience in thermal analysis and design of cooled gas turbine components. ability to generate thermal boundary conditions and perform flow heat transfer engineering calculations both for analytical flow network correlation based and cfd conjugate heat transfer cht based tasks. basic knowledge of finite element analysis ability to review the results. good familiarity with fe codes like ansys or general purpose fea tool. basic knowledge of turbomachinery aerodynamics strength of materials fatigue creep fracture and manufacturing aspects for gas turbine blading. basic working knowledge of nx uni graphics or other similar solid modeling cad software. exposure to sap and title: Data Strategist & Data Architect in MR (f/m/d)
clean_description: our name siemens healthineers was selected to honor our people who dedicate their energy and passion to this because. it reflects their pioneering spirit combined with our long history of engineering in the ever evolving healthcare industry. we offer you a flexible and dynamic environment with opportunities to go beyond your comfort zone in order to grow personally and professionally. then come and join our global team as data strategist data architect f m d in mr to help align the generation transfer and processing of our scanner operational data with our current and future strategic objectives. mobile working from abroad is possible for up to 30 days a year under certain conditions and in selected countries. your tasks and responsibilities as a data strategist you are responsible for the strategic alignment and operational implementation of data management for magnetom mr scanners. as a data architect you ensure the generation transmission and analysis of machine data and machine information created during system operation. where required you design migration strategies for data generation on the scanners. you are responsible for efficient data management which serves as the foundation for holistic data driven decision making. you drive the continuous monitoring of the scanner fleet thereby supporting customers customer service and product lifecycle management in their operations. through monitoring you maintain an up to date view of the installed base enabling you to identify changes at an early stage and ensure smooth and reliable operation. you are responsible for the strategic design of data generation in the context of technological innovations with the goal of sustainably increasing the operational availability of our fleet through maximum diagnosability and data driven maintenance concepts to find out more about the specific business have a look at your qualifications and experience you hold a completed master s degree in data science business computer science mathematics statistics physics with a focus on data analysis or a comparable field. you also have many years of professional experience in the strategic handling of large data volumes for example as a software architect or data strategist preferably in a regulated environment such as healthcare. you have proven expertise in project management within software development and or software architecture. in addition you possess in depth hands on experience with state of the art technologies particularly .net c and c as well as solid knowledge in system modeling using uml. you have advanced expertise in successfully implementing multiple software architecture migration projects in complex and large scale software systems. you are highly confident working in cloud environments. ideally you can provide certifications such as sswa or swa microsoft curriculum certificates or data science training certifications. your attributes and skills you work in an international environment and therefore have fluent german and english skills both written and spoken. you possess strong communication and facilitation skills which you apply effectively in your role as an interface between different stakeholders. your intercultural competence further supports effective collaboration with colleagues around the globe. your strong solution oriented mindset enables you to resolve complex challenges efficiently. you stand out through an analytical and structured way of thinking and working allowing you to continuously and sustainably improve our data management. a passion for the strategic use of large data volumes rounds off your profile. an estimated 5 million patients across the globe benefit every day from our innovative technologies and services in the areas of diagnostic and therapeutic imaging laboratory diagnostics and molecular medicine as well as digital health and enterprise services. change is a constant aspect of our work. we aspire to lead the change in our industry rather than just react to it. that is why we invite you to take on new challenges test your ideas and celebrate success. the title: Electronic Engineering Product Engineer
clean_description: electronic engineering product engineer now s our time to inspire the future of healthcare together. siemens healthineers is a leading global medical technology company with over 170 years of experience and 18 000 patents. we stand with our customers around the world to support them in delivering high quality care to their patients. an estimated 5 million patients across the globe benefit every day from our innovative technologies and services in the areas of diagnostic and therapeutic imaging laboratory diagnostics and molecular medicine as well as digital health and enterprise services. this is what truly matters to us. this is a role well suited to an ambitious professional looking for the next step in their career as a electrical electronic engineer. are you a passionate electrical electronic engineer who can support the manufacturing and design of complex electromechanical medical devices the successful applicant will be a key member of the engineering team with responsibility for providing technical support to the commercial product engineering cpe function and manufacturing operations for electrical electronic assemblies pcbas and associated subsystems. this includes leading root because analysis to implement corrective and preventive actions for production or design issues. this role also involves driving changes to enhance our products improve reliability and monitor component obsolescence management and implementation. as a key member of the team you will be part of a highly innovative multidisciplinary engineering group working on complex problems to serve the needs of laboratories of any size today and tomorrow. drive engineering changes within a regulated framework including the associated v v process and implementation activities required. own part and component obsolescence changes. drive cross functional root because analysis rca and implement corrective and preventive actions capa coordinating with quality suppliers and manufacturing teams. own delivery of technical solutions that enhance product reliability. provide technical support to manufacturing operations for electrical electronic assemblies pcbs and embedded systems. perform component level failure analysis of pcbas to support production and field returns to determine root because. support of design changes related to electronic manufacturing test systems including ict flying probe test equipment and automated test systems. it would be advantageous to have the following experience o experience working effectively with manufacturing quality supply chain and external partners. o experience with design for manufacturability dfm o pcb design experience with a good understanding of design concepts and component selection o knowledge of power electronics sensing and control circuitry cabling routing computing hardware and integration into a complex instrument. o good understanding of emc and methods to eliminate electronic interference o hands on experience with component level diagnostics tools electrical test bench equipment . o knowledge of electronic and mechanical cad design tools. requirements to succeed in this role bachelor s or master s degree in electrical electronic engineering or related field with a minimum of 2 years relevant experience. consideration will also be given to individuals with alternative degrees if balanced by relevant technical experience. experience in electrical electronic engineering preferably in a regulated environment proven track record in problem solving and root because analysis in production settings track record in supplier collaboration and component lifecycle management excellent communication documentation and cross functional collaboration skills. an excellent team player both personally and professionally.

title: Software Developer Image Processing, Research & Development  (f/m/d)
clean_description: our name siemens healthineers was selected to honor our people who dedicate their energy and passion to this because. it reflects their pioneering spirit combined with our long history of engineering in the ever evolving healthcare industry. we offer you a flexible and dynamic environment with opportunities to go beyond your comfort zone in order to grow personally and professionally. then come and join our global team as software developer f m d image processing research development. mobile working from abroad is possible for up to 30 days a year under certain conditions and in selected countries. your tasks and responsibilities you implement state of the art image processing algorithms to advance medical imaging and image guided therapies in interventional radiology. you are responsible for the efficient implementation of image processing algorithms as well as for conducting detailed analyses and optimizations and deploying them on gpu and cpu architecture. in your role you are responsible for the entire development cycle from sound software design through precise product implementation and quality assurance to seamless system integration. you will also actively drive our devops processes thereby ensuring stable and efficient software operations. you work in an agile cross functional and international development team collaborating with internal and external stakeholders from research development product management innovation and user experience. to find out more about the specific business have a look at your qualifications and experience you have successfully completed a master s degree in computer science information technology or electrical engineering. you have several years of professional experience as a software developer ideally in the field of image processing. you have in depth knowledge of software development for real time systems and are familiar with developing high quality product code in c . you have clean_description: as a dedicated and detail oriented dispatcher f m d in the alarm management service you are responsible for the professional acceptance and processing of emergency calls alarms and and ticket systems way of working professional respectful dealings with customers and service technicians on the telephone as well as reliability and understanding of the service concept are a matter clean_description: we empower our people to stay resilient and relevant in a constantly changing world. we are looking for people who are always searching for creative ways to grow and learn. people who want to make a real impact now and in the future. then it seems like you would make a great addition to our vibrant international team. you will create impact by serve as the primary engineering lead for e house projects overseeing and integrating all technical aspects. multidisciplinary integration coordinate effectively across various engineering disciplines including e house design structural architectural and overall layout. medium voltage mv systems switchgear protection and cabling. low voltage lv systems distribution boards motor control centers mccs and auxiliary systems. uninterruptible power supply ups systems design sizing and integration. heating ventilation and air conditioning hvac systems design cooling load calculations and integration. fire gas detection systems integration and compliance. earthing lightning protection systems design and implementation. lighting small power systems design and layout. technical leadership provide technical guidance and mentorship to project engineers and design teams. scope management define manage and review engineering scopes of work ensuring alignment with project requirements and client specifications. documentation standards ensure all engineering deliverables comply with relevant industry standards codes and internal siemens guidelines. oversee the creation and review of technical specifications drawings and reports. stakeholder communication act as a key technical interface with clients vendors subcontractors and internal project teams. risk management identify potential technical risks and develop mitigation strategies. quality assurance drive quality in all engineering outputs and processes. innovation optimization seek opportunities for continuous improvement and optimization in e house design and engineering processes your defining qualities education bachelor s degree in electrical engineering from an accredited institution. experience more than 5 years of progressive experience in electrical design with a significant and demonstrable focus on low voltage power distribution and control systems. this experience should ideally be within industrial infrastructure or modular integrated solutions e.g. e houses skids . technical expertise profound understanding and hands on experience with the design selection and application of lv switchgear motor control centers mccs distribution panels transformers and associated protection devices. proven ability to perform and interpret complex electrical calculations including load flow short circuit analysis voltage drop and protection coordination studies for intricate lv networks. standards regulations in depth knowledge and practical application of relevant international and local electrical codes and standards
